name: Fortune Christmas Cooky Tree
recipeIngredient: 50 slips of paper with fortunes written on
1 styrofoam plastic tree (about 24 inches tall, 9 inches base)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap each cookie in a square of saran wrap, enclosing the fortune slip on the bottom.
2. Secure with fine wire at the bottom of the cookie.
3. After tying, cut the saran wrap close to the cookie, leaving just enough to pin onto the tree.
4. Cut 4-inch lengths from the white ribbon.
5. Starting at the lower corner of the tree, place a white ribbon loop and attach a red Fortune Christmas cookie using a straight pin, placed diagonally on the tree.
6. Pin another white loop on the other side.
7. For the second row, alternate between a white loop, a pink cookie, another white loop, a different pink cookie, and another white loop.
8. For the third row, attach a green bow, tailored to fit the space on the tree.
9. Continue placing cookies and ribbons in this alternating pattern until the tree is completely covered.
10. Finish the edge of the tree with loops of green ribbon.
